reviews.comment:
Buena atencion en playa y en el servicompras, muy atentos los chicos y buenos precios. lugar ideal para tomarse un cafecito y leer el diario... a veces se complica encontrar lugar para estacionar.

(Translated by Google)
Good service on the beach and at the convenience store; the staff are very attentive and the prices are good. It's an ideal place to have a coffee and read the newspaper... sometimes it's difficult to find parking.
